briefdescription.para: XV_csc_Initialize - Initializes an instance of the XV_csc driver.

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr :
Pointer to the XV_csc instance to be initialized.
BaseAddress :
Base address of the device to be looked up and initialized.
This function looks up the configuration for a device using the provided base address, and then initializes the XV_csc instance with the found configuration. If the configuration cannot be found, the function sets the instance's IsReady flag to 0 and returns XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND.

listitem.para: XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the device configuration could not be found.

briefdescription.para: XV_csc_LookupConfig - Looks up the configuration for a Color Space Converter (CSC) instance.

detaileddescription.para:
BaseAddress :
The base address of the CSC instance to look up. If 0, returns the first entry.
This function searches the XV_csc_ConfigTable for an entry matching the provided BaseAddress. If a matching BaseAddress is found, or if BaseAddress is 0 (in which case the first entry is returned), a pointer to the corresponding configuration structure is returned. If no match is found, NULL is returned.

listitem.para: Pointer to the configuration structure if found.
NULL if no matching configuration is found.

briefdescription.para: XV_csc_CfgInitialize - Initializes a specific XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes an XV_csc instance using the provided configuration structure and effective base address. It copies the configuration, sets the base address, and marks the instance as ready for use.

InstancePtr :
Pointer to the XV_csc instance to be initialized.
ConfigPtr :
Pointer to the configuration structure for the instance.
EffectiveAddr :
Physical base address for the hardware instance.
XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
ConfigPtr must not be NULL.
EffectiveAddr must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: Starts the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function initiates the operation of the CSC hardware by setting the appropriate control register bit. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the core is ready. Then, it reads the current value of the control register, preserves the auto-restart bit, and sets the start bit to begin processing.

simplesect.para: None
This function does not wait for the operation to complete.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_csc hardware core has completed its current operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_csc instance to determine if the hardware operation is done. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_csc instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the operation is done, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_csc hardware core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_csc instance and determines whether the core is currently idle. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the core is ready before performing the check.

listitem.para: 0 if the core is not idle.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_csc hardware core is ready to accept new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_csc instance to determine if the core is ready for the next operation. It asserts that the instance pointer is valid and that the core has been initialized. The readiness is determined by checking the 'ap_start' bit in the control register.

listitem.para: 1 if the core is ready for new input.
0 if the core is busy processing previous input.

briefdescription.para: Enables the auto-restart feature for the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the appropriate control register bit to enable automatic restarting of the CSC hardware after each operation, allowing continuous processing without manual intervention.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_csc instance.
CODE
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be equal to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

listitem.para: This function does not check if auto-restart is already enabled.
The function is intended for use with Xilinx CSC hardware.

briefdescription.para: Disable the auto-restart feature of the XV_csc hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart mechanism by writing 0 to the AP_CTRL register of the core. Auto-restart allows the core to automatically start processing after completing the previous operation. Disabling it requires manual intervention to start subsequent operations.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_csc instance.
CODE
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be set to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Sets the input video format hardware register for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the hardware register responsible for configuring the input video format of the Color Space Converter (CSC).

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the input video format register.

simplesect.para: None.
The instance pointer must not be NULL and the instance must be ready.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the input video format.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value from the hardware register that specifies the input video format for the Color Space Converter (CSC) instance.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_csc instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.

simplesect.para: The value of the input video format hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the output video format hardware register for the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the hardware register responsible for configuring the output video format of the CSC core.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the output video format register.

simplesect.para: The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.
None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the output video format hardware register value from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_csc instance.
Must not be NULL.
Must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_OUTVIDEOFORMAT register.
This function asserts that the instance pointer is valid and the component is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the width parameter of the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the XV_csc instance. It first checks that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Width value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the hardware register value for the width parameter of the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the width value from the hardware register associated with the given CSC instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The width value read from the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the height parameter in the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the hardware register responsible for controlling the height in the Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

parameterdescription.para: The height value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None
The instance pointer must not be NULL and the instance must be ready.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register that stores the height parameter for the Color Space Converter (CSC) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the height value from the hardware register associated with the CSC peripheral. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The value of the height register (u32).

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for column start value in the Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified column start value to the hardware register responsible for controlling the column start position in the CSC core.

parameterdescription.para: The column start value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the hardware register for column start from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_COLSTART register from the hardware using the base address provided in the instance configuration. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operation.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_COLSTART hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the column end value in the Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified column end value to the corresponding hardware register. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: The column end value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_COLEND hardware register from the Color Space Converter (CSC) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the column end value from the CSC hardware register, which is used to determine the end column for color space conversion operations.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_csc instance.
Must not be NULL.
Instance must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_COLEND register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is valid and the component is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the row start value in the Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified row start value to the corresponding hardware register. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the HWREG_ROWSTART register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_ROWSTART hardware register from the CSC core.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_ROWSTART register using the base address from the configuration of the provided XV_csc instance. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operation.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_ROWSTART register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the row end value in the Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_ROWEND register of the CSC hardware. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the HWREG_ROWEND register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_ROWEND hardware register from the Color Space Converter (CSC) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_ROWEND register, which typically indicates the end row address or value used in hardware processing for the CSC core. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWREG_ROWEND register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the HWREG_K11 hardware register for the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_K11 register of the CSC hardware. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the HWREG_K11 register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_K11 hardware register from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the K11 register from the hardware using the base address specified in the instance configuration. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operation.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWREG_K11 register.

briefdescription.para: Set the value of the HWREG_K12 hardware register for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_K12 register of the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware. It first checks that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit value to write to the HWREG_K12 register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_K12 hardware register from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_K12 register using the base address from the instance's configuration. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the HWREG_K12 register.

briefdescription.para: Set the value of the HWREG_K13 hardware register for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_K13 register of the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware. It first checks that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the HWREG_K13 register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_K13 hardware register from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

parameterdescription.para:
Pointer to the XV_csc instance.
Must not be NULL.
Must be initialized and ready.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the HWREG_K13 register.
This function asserts that the instance pointer is valid and the instance is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the HWREG_K21 hardware register for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_K21 register of the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: 32-bit value to be written to the HWREG_K21 register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_K21 hardware register from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the HWREG_K21 register using the base address specified in the instance configuration. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operation.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the HWREG_K21 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the HWREG_K22 hardware register for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_K22 register of the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware. It first checks that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the HWREG_K22 register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_K22 hardware register from the CSC (Color Space Converter) instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the K22 register from the hardware using the base address specified in the instance configuration. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the read operation.

simplesect.para: The value read from the HWREG_K22 register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the value of the HWREG_K23 hardware register for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data to the HWREG_K23 register of the Color Space Converter (CSC) hardware. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the HWREG_K23 register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K23 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K23 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K31 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K31 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K31 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K31 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K32 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K32 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K32 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K32 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K33 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K33 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K33 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K33 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the ROffset_V hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the ROffset_V register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the ROffset_V hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the ROffset_V register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the GOffset_V hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the GOffset_V register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the GOffset_V hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the GOffset_V register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the BOffset_V hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the BOffset_V register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the BOffset_V hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the BOffset_V register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the ClampMin_V hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the ClampMin_V register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the ClampMin_V hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the ClampMin_V register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the ClipMax_V hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the ClipMax_V register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the ClipMax_V hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the ClipMax_V register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K11_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K11_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K11_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K11_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K12_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K12_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K12_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K12_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K13_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K13_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K13_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K13_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K21_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K21_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K21_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K21_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K22_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K22_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K22_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K22_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K23_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K23_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K23_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K23_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K31_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K31_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K31_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K31_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K32_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K32_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K32_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K32_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the K33_2 hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the K33_2 register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the K33_2 hardware register value.

simplesect.para: The value of the K33_2 register.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the ROffset_2_V hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: Data to write to the ROffset_2_V register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: This function gets the hardware register R offset 2 value.

simplesect.para: The value of the hardware register R offset 2.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the hardware register G offset 2 value.

parameterdescription.para: The value to set in the hardware register G offset 2.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function gets the hardware register G offset 2 value.

simplesect.para: The value of the hardware register G offset 2.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the hardware register B offset 2 value.

parameterdescription.para: The value to set in the hardware register B offset 2.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function gets the hardware register B offset 2 value.

simplesect.para: The value of the hardware register B offset 2.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the hardware register clamp minimum value.

parameterdescription.para: The value to set in the hardware register clamp minimum.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function gets the hardware register clamp minimum value.

simplesect.para: The value of the hardware register clamp minimum.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the hardware register clip maximum value.

parameterdescription.para: The value to set in the hardware register clip maximum.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function gets the hardware register clip maximum value.

simplesect.para: The value of the hardware register clip maximum.

briefdescription.para: This function enables global interrupts.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function disables global interrupts.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This function enables specific interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: The mask of interrupts to enable.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupts for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the given XV_csc instance. It reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits specified by Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask specifying which interrupts to disable.

listitem.para: The InstancePtr must be valid and initialized.
Only the interrupts specified by Mask will be disabled.

briefdescription.para: This function clears specific interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: The mask of interrupts to clear.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: This Function Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the XV_csc instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the instance is ready. It then reads and returns the value of the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) from the hardware.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt enable register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt status of the Color Space Converter (CSC) core.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) of the CSC hardware to determine the current interrupt status. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt status register (ISR).
